$comment: R1 crash-fix red-on-disable. A malformed string escape leaves the sizeof operand InvalidType; the enclosing cast must fail loud with exactly one H_UnsupportedLoweringForKind (the sizeof, 9:17), NOT crash. Pre-fix the cast called interner.kind() on the InvalidType operand → `TypeInterner::get: TypeId out of range` abort. Revert the lowerCast `if (!operand.type.valid()) return operand;` guard and this aborts instead of emitting the diagnostic, so the runner no longer finds the expected set.
